## Describe the Bug

A clear, concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Open `<app name>` (e.g. Microsoft Word)
2. Type `// <your command here>`
3. Press `Alt+M`
4. Observe: `<what happened>`

## Expected Behaviour

A clear, concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | Windows 11 / macOS Sonoma / Ubuntu 24.04 |
| Kairo Version | `kairo --version` output |
| AI Backend | Ollama (offline) / OpenAI / NVIDIA NIM |
| Model | e.g. qwen2.5-coder:14b |
| Word/Excel/PowerPoint version | e.g. Microsoft 365 v16.x |

## Logs

Paste the relevant portion of `~/.kairo-phantom/kairo.log` here:

```
<paste log here>
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (screenshots, screen recordings, etc.).
